_comment: Template. install.ps1 generates the real config at ~/.pi-pager/notify.config.json with a random ntfy topic.

discord._help: Discord -> Server Settings -> Integrations -> Webhooks -> New Webhook -> Copy URL.

slack._help: Slack -> Apps -> Incoming Webhooks -> Add to workspace -> pick channel -> Copy URL.

telegram._help: 1) Chat @BotFather in Telegram -> /newbot -> copy token. 2) Message your new bot once. 3) curl https://api.telegram.org/bot<TOKEN>/getUpdates -> copy your chat.id.

pushover._help: pushover.net ($5 one-time). Create app -> copy app_token. Dashboard shows your user_key.
